prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Honda AK250E** (356cc air-cooled twin from the Honda CB450 motorcycle) with a **Toda Racing billet crankshaft** (stroke increased to 60mm for 420cc displacement), **JE forged pistons** (11.5:1 compression), and **Tomei 272° camshafts** for high-RPM power delivery (12,000 RPM redline). Pair with a **Honda S2000 AP1 throttle body** (62mm) and **Skunk2 Pro Series intake manifold** for optimized airflow.

Forced induction via a **Garrett GT2560R turbocharger** (custom-machined manifold by **HKS** for the AK250E) running **18 psi** on **E85 fuel**, with a **GReddy Type-S intercooler** (side-mounted due to T360’s compact engine bay) and **Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors**. Boost control managed by a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** with **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor** for precise AFR tuning.

Drivetrain upgrades including a **Honda S660 6-speed manual transmission** (custom bellhousing adapter by **PPG**) with **OS Giken Super Lock LSD**, **Spec Stage 3+ clutch**, and **Nissan R32 GTR driveshafts** (shortened and balanced for the T360’s wheelbase). Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins DFV coilovers** (custom valving for the T360’s 1,300lb weight), **SuperPro poly bushings** (front/rear control arms), and **Wilwood Dynalite 4-piston calipers** (with **Project Mu HC+ pads**) on **15x8 +15 Enkei PF05 wheels** wrapped in **Yokohama AD08R 195/50R15 tires**.
estetica: Full **Liberty Walk LB Works T360 widebody kit** (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with integrated **Seibon carbon fiber splitter**, and rear diffuser with **Voltex GT-Wing** (Type 2, 1,200mm width). Carbon fiber hood with **VIS Racing vent scoops** for AK250E heat extraction.

Interior stripped and reinforced with a **Sparco Pro 2000 seat** (custom mounting brackets for T360’s cabin), **Takata Drift III 4-point harness**, and **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel** (quick-release hub). Full **Defi Advance BF gauges** (oil pressure, boost, AFR) mounted on a **Custom Cages bolt-in roll bar** (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly).

Exterior lighting upgraded to **Morimoto XB LED headlights** (H4 retrofit) and **Depo Racing JDM-style taillights** (clear lens with **Philips Redline bulbs**). Paint scheme: **House of Kolor Kandy Apple Red** with **3M Matte Black vinyl** (hood, roof, and lower rocker panels) and **Rally Armor UR mud flaps** (custom-cut for T360’s track width).
